scripts.dev: docker compose up -d && concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix apps/backend" "npm run dev --prefix apps/frontend"
scripts.dev:apps: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix apps/backend" "npm run dev --prefix apps/frontend"
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run db:up && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:generate && npm run db:seed
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
